hero.name: Roman Ferrero
hero.tagline: Finishing my Computer Engineering degree at Universidad ORT Uruguay. I build full-stack web applications with a focus on JavaScript, Node.js, REST APIs and relational databases.

about.title: Passionate about shipping quality software
about.lead: I am an advanced Computer Engineering student at Universidad ORT Uruguay, close to finishing my degree, with full-stack development training. I work with JavaScript, Node.js, .NET, Java, React and SQL databases, following best practices in programming, documentation and version control.
about.secondary: I interned at BASF as part of the Tech Team, where I optimized processes with VBA macros over SAP data and completed training in .NET, Node.js, Git and SQL. I am looking to start my professional career as a developer, contributing to teams where I can help build, maintain and improve systems in collaborative environments.

skills.title: Tools and technologies
skills.lead: My current stack across academic and personal projects. Always evolving and eager to pick up new technologies when they bring value to the product.

projects.title: Things I have built
projects.lead: A curated selection of academic and personal projects where I apply what I learn and experiment with new technologies.

experience.title: Academic and professional path
experience.lead: A combination of university studies, technical certifications and professional experience, sorted chronologically.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.lead: I'm open to internships, first jobs or collaborative projects. The fastest way to reach me is email or LinkedIn.
contact.emailDescription: For proposals, questions or a virtual coffee.
